Retrieving information...
[Retrieved data]
Based on my review of the retrieved evidence, I find that high copper-silver alloys generally exhibit improved resistance against tarnish and corrosion due to enhanced chemical stability conferred by higher copper content. Thus, stating these materials suffer from poor tarnish and corrosion resistance would indeed be incorrect.
Therefore, I concur with the original assessment presented by Agents A & B.
Answer: \boxed{B} Agree with Option B being false. High copper-silver alloys typically show superior anti-tarnish and anti-corrosion properties rather than inferior performance in this regard. Based on further evidence, the accurate choice must remain \boxed{B}.
